alt: Wild raccoon near a stream, washing food with its nimble paws
caption: Raccoons are famous for appearing to wash their food in water, though they are actually softening it to better feel for inedible parts.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated raccoon habitat image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/7/74/Procyon_lotor_7_-_am_Wasser.jpg
